title: Advancement Recipes
description: A datapack that locks all vanilla recipes behind series of advancement-based questlines.
body:
![Advancement Recipes Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3b1bd8e19b5c74f8b4341369d7aadf60d2945a32.png)

  ---
**A datapack that locks all vanilla recipes behind series of advancement-based questlines.**

  ---
- Each tier of equipment (e.g., stone, copper) is unlocked after completing all advancements in a questline.  
- Other recipes, such as decorative blocks, only require one specific advancement to be unlocked.
- Advancements vary in difficulty and encourage you to explore different aspects of the game.
- Everything can be completed in Hardcore mode.
  
There are six questlines you can complete:  

| Questline      | Number of Advancements | Completion Reward          |
|----------------|----------------------|------------------------------|
| Tutorial       | 6                    | Wooden Equipment             |
| Questline 1    | 14                   | Stone Equipment              |
| Questline 2    | 26                   | Copper Equipment             |
| Questline 3    | 36                   | Iron Equipment, Nether Access|
| Questline 4    | 37                   | Diamond Equipment            |
| Questline 5    | 19                    | Eye of Ender                 |
| Questline 6    | 11                   | Crafter                      |

_+ 1 secret one!_

### A total of 150 advancements!

![Explanation on how this datapack works](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4d6844d8f0011e18de36f50828ac405aad39a465.png)
  ---
